title: Modify Zone Settings on the Zone Config Aveva API Page
summary: Use the Update Zone Configuration function on the Zone Config Aveva API page to review current lane-to-zone configuration information and modify supported zone settings when operational needs require a configuration change.
when_to_use: Use when zone settings need to be modified through the Zone Config Aveva API page to adapt operations based on system needs or changing requirements, and when the current lane assignments, respective zones, and processing sequence numbers need to be reviewed as part of that change.
not_for: Do not use when the required zone setting change is unclear from the source.
Do not use if the page does not allow the intended modification.
Do not use if the updated configuration cannot be verified from the displayed information.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Navigate to the Zone Config Aveva API page, review current configuration details, perform supported zone setting changes using Update Zone Configuration, and verify the displayed configuration after the change.

safety_notes: This procedure is not marked support-safe because it changes configuration that may affect operations.
The source does not define safeguards, approval requirements, or rollback steps for zone configuration changes.
Stop and escalate if the intended change is unclear or cannot be verified from the page.
